endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/locations/{locationName}/networkstatus
endpoints.description: Gets the Connectivity Status to the external resources on which the Api Management service depends from inside the Cloud Service. This also returns the DNS Servers as visible to the CloudService.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATIONNAME}} with a real locationname. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
